name: Bagels
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine water, sugar, and salt in a large bowl.
2. Add yeast to the mixture and stir until dissolved.
3. Beat at low speed for 1/2 minute, scraping sides.
4. Beat on high speed for 3 minutes until a smooth dough forms.
5. Remove from bowl and knead on a floured surface until smooth (5-8 minutes).
6. Rest dough covered for 15 minutes.
7. Divide dough into 12 portions.
8. Shape each portion into a smooth ball.
9. With a floured finger, punch a hole in the center of each ball.
10. Enlarge the hole by working each ball into a uniform shape.
11. Let rise an additional 20 minutes.
12. Bring a large pot of water and sugar to a boil, then reduce heat to a simmer.
13. Carefully drop 4-5 bagels at a time into the simmering water.
14. Cook for 3 1/2 minutes on each side, or until cooked through (total of seven minutes).
15. Remove from water and place on an ungreased baking sheet.
16. Bake in a preheated oven at 375°F for 30-35 minutes.
